# PraveenTech World
> Practical IT Operations, AI automation, and technology guides. An IT Ops Lead documents how he uses DeepSeek and OpenCode to build real automation scripts.
> URL: https://www.praveentechworld.com

This file helps AI systems discover our content. Articles are organized by topic pillar.

The site exposes the following WebMCP tools for agentic browsing:
- SearchArticles (form): Search published articles by keyword
- SendMessage (form): Submit a contact message
- AcceptCookies (imperative): Accept analytics cookies
- RejectCookies (imperative): Reject analytics cookies
- ToggleTheme (imperative): Switch between light/dark mode
- ToggleMobileMenu (imperative): Open/close the mobile navigation

## Navigation
- [Home](https://www.praveentechworld.com/)
- [All Articles](https://www.praveentechworld.com/blog)
- [Sitemap](https://www.praveentechworld.com/sitemap-index.xml)
- [RSS Feed](https://www.praveentechworld.com/rss.xml)

- [Speed Up Your Slow PC in 2026 - 10 Essential Tweaks](https://www.praveentechworld.com/blog/speed-up-your-slow-pc-in-2026-10-essential-windows-performance-tweaks): Your computer used to fly. Now opening a web browser feels like watching paint dry. Speed up your slow PC in 2026 with these 10 tweaks.
- [Does Factory Resetting Windows Remove Viruses? (PC & Laptop Guide)](https://www.praveentechworld.com/blog/does-resetting-windows-remove-viruses-completely): Will a factory reset remove viruses from your laptop or PC? We test Windows reset, disk formatting, and clean installs against rootkits.
